title: Punjab & Haryana HC denies anticipatory bail to Madhu Kishwar in case over misleading X post about PM Modi
description: The Punjab and Haryana High Court on Friday denied anticipatory bail to academic Madhu Purnima Kishwar in a case involving allegations of a video being circulated on social media with false claims that the person in it was Prime Minister Narendra Modi.According to media reports, the X post shared by Kishwar claimed that the man receiving a facial massage in a video was the Prime Minister. The claim was later debunked by fact-checkers.Kishwar was eventually booked by the Chandigarh police in
